title: How to Reset Your Password
content: To reset your password: 1) Go to login page 2) Click 'Forgot Password' 3) Enter your email 4) Check your inbox for reset link 5) Click the link and create new password. Link expires in 24 hours.

title: Troubleshooting 404 Errors
content: If you encounter 404 errors: 1) Clear browser cache 2) Try incognito mode 3) Check URL spelling 4) Ensure you have proper access permissions 5) Contact support if issue persists.

title: Payment Processing Guide
content: For payment issues: 1) Verify card details 2) Check if card is enabled for online transactions 3) Ensure sufficient balance 4) Try a different payment method 5) Contact your bank if declined.

title: Data Export Tutorial
content: To export your data: 1) Go to Settings > Data Export 2) Select date range 3) Choose format (CSV, JSON, Excel) 4) Click Export button 5) Download will start automatically. Large exports may take 5-10 minutes.

title: Performance Optimization Tips
content: To improve performance: 1) Close unnecessary browser tabs 2) Clear browser cache 3) Check internet speed 4) Try different browser 5) Disable browser extensions temporarily.

title: Username Recovery Steps
content: To recover username: 1) Go to login page 2) Click 'Forgot Username' 3) Enter registered email 4) Check inbox for username reminder 5) Use username to login.

title: File Upload Guidelines
content: File upload limits: Free plan: 5MB, Pro plan: 50MB, Enterprise: 500MB. Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PNG, JPG. For large files, use compression or upgrade your plan.

title: API Authentication Guide
content: API authentication requires valid API key in header: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY. Keys can be generated in Settings > API Keys. Keys expire after 90 days.

title: SSO Integration Setup
content: SSO integration steps: 1) Enable SSO in Admin panel 2) Configure identity provider 3) Add redirect URLs 4) Test connection 5) Deploy to users. Supports Okta, Azure AD, Auth0.

title: Billing and Invoices FAQ
content: Billing FAQ: Plans are billed monthly. View invoices in Billing > Invoices. Update payment method in Billing > Payment Methods. Refunds processed within 5-7 business days.
